privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task uses synthetic user, role, and policy configurations that match the task description and verifier scripts. The Wazuh API URL is explicitly configured as "https://localhost:55000" in task_utils.sh, and export_result.sh specifically checks for the creation of user "analyst_jsmith", role "soc_analyst_readonly", policy "readonly_agents", and the verification file at "/home/ga/rbac_verification.json".
